description: A subscriber's credit card has expired, and they need to update their payment information to keep their streaming service active.

nodes.task_description: Identify the subscriber and confirm their subscription is at risk due to a failed payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the subscriber and the payment failure.

nodes.task_description: Securely collect the new credit card information from the subscriber.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uses a secure form to capture the new payment details.

nodes.task_description: Update the payment method on the subscriber's account and re-run the failed charge.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the payment info and processes the payment.
